name: Tiffany N. Brooks
bio: Tiffany N. Brooks has held multiple city and county government positions. She received Not Recommended ratings from every Alliance bar association and a Not Recommended from the CBA — a universally negative assessment from the legal community. She is running against two well-rated candidates in this three-way race.
background: Multiple city and county government jobs.

bar_ratings.alliance_detail: Not Recommended — unanimous from all Alliance bar associations

red_flags.label: Universal Not Recommended from all bar associations
red_flags.detail: Every bar association in the Alliance of Bar Associations for Judicial Screening, as well as the Chicago Bar Association, rated Tiffany N. Brooks as Not Recommended for this judicial seat. This near-consensus negative assessment from the legal community is a significant concern for voters evaluating judicial qualifications.
